rationale: Russian strikes on Kyiv continue without qualitative escalation for Poland; oil price decline from the US-Iran deal persists as background positive for energy costs.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Ongoing Russian strikes on Kyiv continue the established war pattern with no new escalation toward Poland. Baseline remains stable — no qualitative change for Polish residents.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline from the US-Iran deal offers modest relief on energy costs for Polish households and businesses, but this is now a continuation of last cycle's development.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan investment deal has limited direct impact on Poland, though it signals continued Western economic cooperation that indirectly supports EU trade stability.
